title: Executive Order 5510—Power-Site Restoration No. 456
text:
Wyoming
So much of the orders of May 26, 1909, creating Temporary Power-Site Withdrawal No. 5, and of July 2, 1910, creating Power-Site Reserve No. 5, as affects the following described lands is hereby revoked:
SIXTH PRINCIPAL MERIDIAN
T. 33 N., R. 108 W., sec. 34, SW. ¼ NE. ¼, SW. ¼ SE. ¼.
HERBERT HOOVER
The White House,
December 10, 1930.
